actions.script: var signInLink = document.querySelector('a[aria-label="Sign in"]'); var serviceLoginLink = document.querySelector('a[href*="ServiceLogin"]'); var signInSpan = document.querySelector('.gb_ce'); if (signInLink || serviceLoginLink || signInSpan) { return 'not_logged_in'; } return 'logged_in';

if ('${login_status}' === 'not_logged_in') { var signInLink = document.querySelector('a[aria-label="Sign in"]') || document.querySelector('a[href*="ServiceLogin"]'); if (signInLink) { signInLink.click(); return 'sign_in_clicked'; } return 'sign_in_not_found'; } return 'already_logged_in';
